Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] <code><!-- Mark with x -->[ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)</code>
- [ ] <code><!-- Mark with x -->[ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)</code>
- [ ] <code><!-- Mark with x -->[ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)</code>
- [ ] <code><!-- Mark with x -->[ ] Documentation update</code>

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `bun run build` and it passes
- [ ] I have run `bun test` and all tests pass
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published
